title: Project: Fragments
description: This mod adds many unique weapons called the fragments, and is originally made for the streamer project Minecraft Fragment by axxin
body:
# Description
This mod adds many new and unique weapons and artifacts to [Minecraft](https://www.minecraft.net/), the mod require [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/), [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and the [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) to work. It was orignially made for the minecraft project "Minecraft Fragments" called to life by twitch streamer [axxin](https://www.twitch.tv/axxin_live)

# Supported Minecraft Versions
- 1.21.4
- 1.21.1 (Discontinued)

# Fragment Description 
- Schattenschleier 
- - _a axe like weapon dealing a lot more damage_
- Schword Fragment
- Mace fragment
- Elytra fragment 
- - _this elytra lets a player boost up to 5 times_
- Speer fragment 
- - _a speer like the one getting added to Minecraft_
- Crops fragment 
- - _crops drop more_
- Pandora fragment 
- - _removes bad effects and gives saturation_
- Fragment pickaxe 
- - _a pickaxe that breaks a 3x3 area_
- Hordentreiber fragment 
- - _spawns zombies to help a player kill the enemy_
- Strenght fragment 
- - _gives a player strenght 1 effect_
- Fragment necklace 
- - _the player deals more damage to armor_
- Chestplate fragment
- Bow fragment

# Configuration
Many thinks can be configured by using the cloth config mod.

# Modpacks
You are free to use this mod in any of your modpacks

# About
Project: Fragments adds many new items called fragments, having them give you a lot of power but you can be seen from far away. Fragments are powerfull items and therefor they cant be destroyed and grand the wearing person some savetime on pickup.
